title: Viral TikTok Sweet Potato Beef Bowl
description: A flavorful and high-protein bowl featuring roasted sweet potatoes, seasoned ground beef, and creamy warmed cottage cheese, all finished with a signature hot honey drizzle.
instructions: Preheat your air fryer to 400°F (or oven to 425°F). Toss cubed sweet potatoes with olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Air fry for 15–18 minutes (or roast for 25 minutes), shaking halfway, until tender and slightly caramelized.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat and brown the ground beef, breaking it apart as it cooks.
Season the beef with garlic powder, onion powder, smoked paprika, cumin, salt, and pepper. Cook for 8–10 minutes until slightly crispy, then drain excess fat.
Gently warm the cottage cheese in a small saucepan over low heat for 2–3 minutes until silky.
Assemble the bowls by layering sweet potatoes and seasoned beef, then add a dollop of warm cottage cheese.
Drizzle generously with hot honey and finish with optional toppings like chives, red pepper flakes, or everything bagel seasoning.
